author: doll-agent
content: Add a second proptest! block in tests/property_tests.rs covering 11 f32 monomorphization properties: sin/cos derivatives, exp, ln, sqrt, chain rule, power rule, constant zero, identity, pythagorean cancellation, and add commutativity. Use approx_eq_f32 with relative tolerance 1e-4 (absorbs f32's ~1e-7 precision floor at moderate x). 256 cases per property. NaN-aware comparison.
